title: DashboardProposal
description: A proposed dashboard produced by an agent (or a fixture). Carries NO ids — nothing is minted until the proposal is applied via POST /api/dashboards/apply-proposal. Data panels reference an existing pipeline-output DataType by id.

type.description: No `divider`: dropped from the proposal flow's agent-facing type set for parity with create_panel (HEL-249/HEL-315/HEL-316). The backend wire (PanelType.fromString) still accepts it on other paths.

dataTypeId.description: Required for metric/chart/table/collection/timeline panels; must be a pipeline-output DataType (sourceId null). Omitted for text/markdown/image/divider.

fieldMapping.description: Panel-type-keyed mapping: metric {value,label?,unit?}; chart {xAxis,yAxis,series?}; table {columns}. fieldMapping.label/unit bind to a data column, distinct from the top-level label/unit literal override below.

aggregation.description: Optional viz-level aggregation, metric/chart only: metric {value,agg}; chart {groupBy,agg,yField}. agg is one of count|sum|avg|min|max.

content.description: Initial body for text/markdown panels. Ignored for other panel types.

url.description: Initial image URL for image panels (mapped internally to config.imageUrl). Ignored for other panel types.

orientation.description: Initial orientation for divider panels. Ignored for other panel types.

chartType.description: Chart sub-type for chart panels, applied as a best-effort follow-up appearance update after create. Ignored for other panel types.

xAxisLabel.description: Chart x-axis title, chart panels only. Applied via the same follow-up appearance update as chartType.

yAxisLabel.description: Chart y-axis title, chart panels only. Applied via the same follow-up appearance update as chartType.

seriesColors.description: Chart series colors, chart panels only. Applied via the same follow-up appearance update as chartType.

label.description: Literal display label for a metric panel — distinct from fieldMapping.label, which binds to a data column. Renders even when no matching bound column exists.

unit.description: Literal display unit for a metric panel — distinct from fieldMapping.unit, which binds to a data column.

config.description: Optional generic passthrough merged over the config derived from the flat fields above, then decoded by the same panel-create path as POST /api/panels. Makes every v1.5 config surface expressible: collection {baseType,layout}; timeline {timelineOptions:{sort}}; chart {chartOptions}; table {density,columnOrder}; text/markdown {content, dataTypeId, fieldMapping}. On key conflict this wins over a derived flat field, EXCEPT a metric/chart/table/collection/timeline panel's dataTypeId, which always stays the flat-field value. A text/markdown config.dataTypeId is a real binding attempt (HEL-244) and is validated against the same pipeline-only rule as any other panel's binding — a source-companion or non-owned DataType is rejected (400); a valid pipeline-output DataType succeeds.
